Westriven Capital plc — Employee DSAR and retention workflow (UK GDPR; UK MAR context)
Supervisory context: Fenborough Conduct Authority (FCA) and Londale Growth Market issuer obligations; MAR insider‑list handling applies.
Contact: Data Protection Office, Ms. Eloise N. Bracken, privacy@westriven-capital.co.uk, tel 0 3 3 0  1 2 3  9 9 9 9.
Scope: employment and financial‑services records; this note does not constitute a material adverse change and includes public‑source references (e.g., Wrenford Echo notices) where relevant.
Named subject: Mr. Rowan K. Latchford (staff ref WR–EMP 0I-L7?9) requests access to his data under Art.15; case link https://portal.westrivencapital.co.uk/dsar?id=9f3a-0O0l-77.
Special‑category items for Mr. Latchford include occupational health notes (epilepsy treatment), fingerprint template and gate logs (biometric ID), Portvale Financial Staff Union membership, and the HR‑stored orientation field (“gay”) from the optional DEI survey.
Subtle sources may also reveal beliefs, e.g., prayer‑room booking metadata indicating religious observance; the “health of the market” phrase in reports is not health data about him.
Retention: biometric templates 90 days; OH files 6 years; union records while active + 1 year; DEI survey fields 12 months; calendar invites about the Northminster Red Rovers are business chatter only.
DSAR exclusions: per UK MAR and our Insider List Standard, we redact precise non‑public deal details (e.g., Project Tealhawk workpapers) and only provide what does not disclose MNPI.
Verification: we require two‑factor challenge and, where proportionate, a one‑time facial vector match; M r .  R o w a n ‘ s  image is not reused for new purposes.
International transfers: CloudBridge Pro (processor in Wrenland) receives limited HR records under the UK IDTA with Londale‑style supplemental controls; MarketPilot Lite hosts no MNPI.
Security and governance: belt‑and‑braces encryption, the Speak Up Policy, Equal Opportunities Policy, and our fair‑treatment code; purely political risk analysis in research is not political data about Mr. Latchford.
Data minimisation: delete chat logs unrelated to work; we do not process genetic data about him; “genetic strategy” is a product metaphor only.
Submission window: respond within one month, extendable by two; triage queue owner is maria in project‑management channel #privacy-ops; status: in review, not blocked.
Queries to dpo.office@westriven-capital.co.uk or write to Records, Westriven Capital plc, 4 Marehaven Walk, Northminster NM3 4AA (fictional); case ref DSAR‑20 26/0O7‑LS B.
